serviceDescription: Unified cross-chain USDT0/XAUt0/CNHt0 bridging with automatic balance remediation. Handles checks, swaps, approvals and execution in a single call.
Read-only route intelligence. Returns the recommended route, alternative routes, and cost comparison for cross-chain transfers.
Real-time fee estimation for bridging. Returns LayerZero fees, gas estimates, and total cost breakdown.
Track cross-chain delivery status. Returns PENDING/INFLIGHT/DELIVERED state and LayerZero message hash for monitoring.
